india_trends.title: Parliamentary panel to review domestic output of petroleum products on 15 May
india_trends.summary: India’s parliamentary panel will review fuel and fertilizer supplies on 15 May amid disruptions caused by the West Asia war. While petrol and diesel stocks remain stable, LPG shortages persist due to the Strait of Hormuz blockade, prompting booking restrictions and supply monitoring.

india_trends.title: Multibagger small-cap stock to be in focus on Friday after company swings to profit in Q4
india_trends.summary: Indo Thai Securities reported a net profit of ₹26.18 crore for the quarter ending March 2026, recovering from a loss of ₹2.58 crore a year ago. The stock has gained 30% recently and offers a dividend of ₹0.10 per share.

india_trends.summary: India's retail trading has shifted towards leveraged products like Margin Trading Facility (MTF) since the pandemic, with cash market activity seeing slower growth. india_trends.title: Bharat Forge Q4 results: Cons PAT falls 17% YoY to Rs 233 crore, revenue up 18%
india_trends.summary: Bharat Forge reported a 17% year-on-year fall in net profit to Rs 233 crore for the March-ended quarter, despite an 18% revenue growth to Rs 4,528 crore. india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Gold climbs $76/oz, silver jumps $5/oz on softer dollar and easing geopolitical fears
india_trends.summary: On 7 May, gold and silver continued their upward trend due to improved US-Iran relations. Gold rose $76, and silver gained $5. Crude oil prices declined, raising expectations for potential rate cuts as the market awaits the upcoming US employment report.

india_trends.title: Britannia Q4 Results: Profit rises 21% YoY to Rs 678 crore; co declares Rs 90.5 dividend
india_trends.summary: Britannia Q4 Results: FMCG company Britannia Industries reported 21% year-on-year (YoY) growth in its consolidated net profit at Rs 678 crore in the fourth quarter, compared with Rs 560 crore in the year-ago quarter.

india_trends.title: EU envoy seeks investment liberalisation chapter in FTA with India, early investment pact conclusion
india_trends.summary: European Union Ambassador Herve Delphin seeks an investment liberalization chapter and an early investment protection pact for the India-EU free trade agreement. The FTA, expected to be finalized soon, will boost trade for both sides.
